name: Tf2_solo_LTR_architecture
description: Solo Tf2 LTR architecture in S. pombe. ~350 bp recombination remnants of unequal homologous recombination between the two LTRs of a full-length Tf2 element. ~30 solo LTRs scattered genome-wide; the dominant LTR-class repeat in the S. pombe genome. Form many of the dispersed paralog-family matches in genome alignments.

architecture.internal_structure: 350 bp dispersed unit; LTR 350 bp where applicable
